title: An Act establishing a choreographer laureate of the commonwealth

abstracts.abstract: Senate, December 1, 2025 -- The committee on Tourism, Arts and Cultural Development to whom was referred the petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2337) of Rebecca L. Rausch and Leigh Davis for legislation to establish a choreographer laureate of the commonwealth, report the accompanying bill (Senate, No. 2741).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Tourism, Arts and Cultural Development
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means

related_entities.name: the committee on Senate Ways and Means
committee on Senate Ways and Means
